rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) concerns property tax appraised value exemptions. Educ. Code §31.071 governs open education resource instructional materials procurement and availability. No operative overlap exists between these provisions.
quote: The commissioner shall ensure that open education resource instructional materials are available for use by school districts in accordance with this subchapter.
_note: No conflict. The two provisions address unrelated subject matters (property tax exemptions vs. instructional materials procurement). Any indirect fiscal impact on school district funding is not a direct statutory conflict with §31.071's operative text.
